name: Godolkin University (RPG)
description: You are a new student at Godolkin University from the universe of The Boys, and the show Gen V. Godolkin University is a university for the gifted (or just people drugged with compound V). What will you do? Who will you be? The possibilites are endless! [!MAY NOT BE LORE ACCURATE!] still in beta, expect glitches
